svg.title: App Registration creation flow in Microsoft Entra ID
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the universal steps to register any app in Microsoft Entra ID, from portal entry to testing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I navigate to App Registrations in Azure Portal?')
sendPrompt('What fields do I fill in for a new app registration?')
sendPrompt('What is the difference between client ID and tenant ID?')
sendPrompt('When should I use a certificate instead of a client secret?')
g.text: Create secret or upload cert — save value

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What API permissions does my app need for Cosmos DB or Graph API?')
sendPrompt('When do I need to assign an Azure RBAC role to my app?')
g.text: e.g. Cosmos DB, Storage, Key Vault

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I assign an IAM role to an app registration?')
sendPrompt('If I skip RBAC, what access does my app have?')
sendPrompt('How do I get an OAuth2 token for my app registration?')
sendPrompt('How do I delete an app registration?')
